calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629.. Steven C. Williams, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Steephen J. Chamber, Esq. appeared for Defendant. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. Defendant will vacate 1755 Van Ness Ave. #105 on or before 8/1/02. Plaintiff will waive rents owed and will p[ay Defendant $10,000, $7,500 now and 2,500on 8/1/02. Security deposit will be handled as provided for by law and parties to pay their own fees and costs. Trial date of 3/25/02 vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629.. Steven C. Williams, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Steephen J. Chamber, Esq. appeared for Defendant. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. Defendant will vacate 1755 Van Ness Ave. #105 on or before 8/1/02. Plaintiff will waive rents owed and will p[ay Defendant $10,000; $7,500 now and
$2,500on 8/1/02. Security deposit will be handled as provided for by law and parties to pay their own fees and costs. Trial date of 3/25/02 vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: OFF CALENDAR, MOTION ADVANCED TO 1-28-02 PER EXPARTE ORDER.

Motion To Strike And/Or Demurrer
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven C. Williams, Esq. 552-8230 for pltf & opposing party; Stephen J. Camber, Esq. 255-2490 for deft & moving party; (courtesy copies submitted for review).
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven C. Williams, Esq. 552-8230 for pltf & opposing party; no appearance by deft.
RULING: The Court denies the motion upon presentation of proof of service. Order signed in open court.
